title: 'Elchanan #0445
definition:
Elhanan = "God has been gracious"

 1) Jair's son who fought the Gittites
 2) Dodo's son who was a chief of David
nasbUsage:
Definition: Elhanan = "God has been gracious"

 1) Jair's son who fought the Gittites
 2) Dodo's son who was a chief of David

    NASB:  God has been gracious, two of Davids leaders
